t.t-value: company_logo_raw and (company_logo_raw.decode() if hasattr(company_logo_raw, 'decode') else company_logo_raw)
getattr(object, 'amount_month', False) or (object.sub_plan_id.amount_month if object.sub_plan_id else False) or object.price
monthly_amount and formatLang(monthly_amount, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)
object.price and formatLang(object.price, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)

div.p: Your Zeeve for is fully activated. Validator operations are now secured with our automated monitoring, failover, and staking analytics.
Access validator telemetry, rewards, and governance workflows from your Zeeve dashboard.
Need validator strategy support? Reach us at .

t.t-value: company_logo_raw and (company_logo_raw.decode() if hasattr(company_logo_raw, 'decode') else company_logo_raw)
getattr(object, 'amount_month', False) or (object.sub_plan_id.amount_month if object.sub_plan_id else False) or object.price
monthly_amount and formatLang(monthly_amount, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)
object.price and formatLang(object.price, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)

div.p: Your Zeeve for has been successfully upgraded. Expect higher delegation limits, priority failover, and proactive validator management.
Review your validator metrics to experience the added throughput and resilience.

t.t-value: company_logo_raw and (company_logo_raw.decode() if hasattr(company_logo_raw, 'decode') else company_logo_raw)
getattr(object, 'amount_month', False) or (object.sub_plan_id.amount_month if object.sub_plan_id else False) or object.price
monthly_amount and formatLang(monthly_amount, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)
object.price and formatLang(object.price, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)

div.p: Your validator subscription now reflects the new configuration.
We have completed the downgrade for your Zeeve on . Validator availability remains uninterrupted with the capabilities of your current plan.
Revisit the Zeeve console whenever you wish to scale back up or enable premium features.
Let us know if you need guidance on validator economics at .

t.t-value: company_logo_raw and (company_logo_raw.decode() if hasattr(company_logo_raw, 'decode') else company_logo_raw)
getattr(object, 'amount_month', False) or (object.sub_plan_id.amount_month if object.sub_plan_id else False) or object.price
monthly_amount and formatLang(monthly_amount, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)
object.price and formatLang(object.price, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)

div.p: This email confirms the cancellation of your Zeeve on . Validator operations associated with this subscription will be gracefully stopped as per the termination schedule.
If you would like to resume validator services or explore other networks, we would be delighted to support you again.
Thank you for choosing Zeeve as your validator infrastructure partner.

t.t-value: company_logo_raw and (company_logo_raw.decode() if hasattr(company_logo_raw, 'decode') else company_logo_raw)

div.p: Beam L1 validator onboarding has been initiated for . Details are captured below for quick provisioning.
A customer just secured a Beam L1 validator slot. Make sure validator provisioning, staking delegation and monitoring are planned before the requested start date.
Coordinate with the validator engineering team for hardware allocation, keys management and on-chain staking. Capture any blockers directly in the dashboard notes.
If you need escalations with Beam Foundation or staking partners, flag the account manager immediately.

t.t-value: company_logo_raw and (company_logo_raw.decode() if hasattr(company_logo_raw, 'decode') else company_logo_raw)

div.p: Beam L1 validator onboarding has been initiated for . Details are captured below for quick provisioning.
A customer just secured a Beam L1 validator slot. Make sure validator provisioning, staking delegation and monitoring are planned before the requested start date.
Coordinate with the validator engineering team for hardware allocation, keys management and on-chain staking. Capture any blockers directly in the dashboard notes.
If you need escalations with Beam Foundation or staking partners, flag the account manager immediately.

t.t-value: company_logo_raw and (company_logo_raw.decode() if hasattr(company_logo_raw, 'decode') else company_logo_raw)
getattr(object, 'amount_month', False) or (object.sub_plan_id.amount_month if object.sub_plan_id else False) or object.price
monthly_amount and formatLang(monthly_amount, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)
object.price and formatLang(object.price, currency_obj=object.currency_id or company.currency_id)

div.p: Your validator infrastructure has been provisioned and is ready for staking operations.
Great news! Your Beam L1 validator is now live on Zeeve's managed infrastructure. You can begin participating in consensus, tracking rewards, and managing delegation preferences immediately.

Visit your Zeeve dashboard to review validator metrics, configure alerts, and set delegation preferences. Save your keys and validator credentials in a secure location—our team is available should you need any assistance.
Need help with validator strategy or staking delegation? Reach us at .
